---
mode: agent
---

* Use strict Gherkin formatting
* Each step (Given / When / Then / And) MUST be on a new line
* Never combine multiple steps on the same line
* Always put "Feature:", "Background:", and "Scenario:" on their own lines
* Add a blank line between Feature, Background, and each Scenario
* Indent steps under Background and Scenario by 2 spaces
* Use Given / When / Then structure properly
* Keep steps atomic and reusable
* Do NOT put logic inside feature files
* Keep assertions inside Then steps
* Use descriptive scenario names
